title: 21 Hermes Lessons to Get You Started
summary: Jack Roberts presents 21 practical lessons for getting started with Hermes, an open-source language model. The video provides guidance on using and applying Hermes effectively.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through 21 lessons for beginners getting started with Hermes, providing foundational guidance on the model or framework. The format breaks the introduction into discrete lessons, giving newcomers a structured entry point rather than a single overview. The takeaway is a starting curriculum for working with Hermes from the ground up.
